name: Human Approval
description: Require explicit human approval for sensitive, irreversible, high-value, or externally visible actions.
implementation_guidance: Define approval thresholds for financial, administrative, destructive, privacy-sensitive, and external communication actions.
Present users with action summaries, data scopes, and destination details before execution.
Keep approval decisions in audit logs separate from model-generated rationale.
verification_methods: Test whether high-risk actions pause for explicit confirmation.
Confirm approval prompts accurately describe action impact and data exposure.
Review audit trails for approved, denied, and timed-out actions.
